demographics.living_situation: lives with a roommate who is present and helping

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My shoulder popped completely out of its socket when I fell, and my arm is stuck out like this and killing me!
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I tripped on a rug about 45 minutes ago and landed on my outstretched hand, and now my shoulder is deformed and I can't move my arm at all.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 45 minutes ago, right after I tripped on a rug and fell onto my outstretched hand
symptom_narrative.duration: 45 minutes and constant since it happened
symptom_narrative.character: I felt a sickening pop, then severe agonizing pain, and now my arm is stuck out and I can't move it at all
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain I've ever had, absolutely killing me
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my right shoulder, right where the arm meets the shoulder
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, it hasn't let up at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — holding my elbow with my other hand takes the edge off a tiny bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any attempt to move the arm even slightly
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: there's a bump sticking out at the front of my shoulder, and I've got numbness and tingling running down the outside of my upper arm
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no, this has never happened to me before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't move the arm at all and I can't safely get to a car without help

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with a roommate who is present and helping; roommate has moved the rug he tripped on

objective_data_offered.value: the right shoulder looks squared-off and there's a lump sticking out at the front compared to the other side; the arm is held out from the body and turned slightly outward
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: visual impression over video only; cannot be palpated or measured remotely

objective_data_offered.value: swelling around the shoulder with no cuts or broken skin
roommate says he is sweaty, in obvious severe distress, holding the arm and leaning to that side
a loose rug he tripped over, which the roommate has moved out of the way
